name: Solo Combat RPG
author: b62c2cffcb8be30d
command:
Solo Combat Tables

d6 Enemy Action Table
### Roll for enemy behavior during combat.
Defensive movement
Attacks nearest target
Uses strongest attack
Repositions tactically
Uses environment
Reckless aggression

d6 Enemy Personality Table
### Combat personalities that influence how enemies behave.
Berserker - Rushes aggressively
Coward - Retreats or hides often
Defender - Protects allies
Ranged Fighter - Prefers distance
Trickster - Uses traps or dirty tactics
Leader - Coordinates and commands

d6 Morale Checks
### Roll when morale is tested due to major battlefield events.
Panic and flee
Defensive fighting
Continue as normal
Continue as normal
Reckless desperation
Surrender

d8 Battlefield Reactions
### Dynamic battlefield events that create pressure and change combat.
Weather change
Something breaks or collapses
Visibility changes
Something arrives
Movement becomes difficult
Sudden energy or chaos erupts
Something worsens
A new danger reveals itself

d20 Oracle Monster Action Words
### Roll an action word and combine it with a descriptor to create a monster concept.
Hunting
Swarming
Watching
Burrowing
Stalking
Corrupting
Feeding
Wandering
Screaming
Hiding
Guarding
Mutating
Crawling
Consuming
Infecting
Lurking
Chasing
Shifting
Whispering
Escaping

d20 Oracle Monster Descriptor Words
### Roll a descriptor word and combine it with an action word to create a monster concept.
Ancient
Diseased
Arcane
Hollow
Burning
Frozen
Massive
Mechanical
Twisted
Shadowed
Broken
Hungry
Crystalized
Rotting
Winged
Eyeless
Feral
Glowing
Forgotten
Toxic

d20 Enemy Goals
### Enemy motivations that create dynamic encounters beyond simple combat.
Protect territory
Steal supplies
Capture prisoners
Delay you
Escape safely
Protect a leader
Defend an artifact
Hunt for food
Intimidate intruders
Guard a secret
Destroy evidence
Complete a ritual
Test your strength
Survive
Drive you away
Recover something stolen
Spread corruption or disease
Protect offspring or allies
Distract
Serve a higher power or master
